content.text:
[cron:8157ed89-ee52-482d-a791-31181c4fff11 evening-email-review-and-calendar-check] Review the Gmail inbox of atlas.ia.agente@gmail.com using gog for pending items, unresolved tasks, and near-term deadlines. Organize relevant items into the appropriate shared calendar flow for Gustavo by citing/scheduling what applies toward toledo970501@gmail.com, then send Gustavo a concise WhatsApp reminder to +573183718246 with the evening paneo: what is still pending, what rolls into tomorrow, and what deadlines are close. Keep it concise and practical.
Current time: Tuesday, March 31st, 2026 — 7:00 PM (America/Bogota) / 2026-04-01 00:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
